education.degree: Bachelor of Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence

projects.name: Plant Disease Diagnosis Expert System
projects.description: An advanced Multi-Agent AI pipeline that diagnoses 5 types of crops (Tomato, Apple, Potato, Rice, Wheat) with 100% diagnostic reasoning.
features: 6 Specialized Agents (Vision, Retriever, Evidence, PlantNet, Verify, Response)
Multi-modal: Analyzes leaf images using Vision LLMs
RAG: Matches symptoms against a vector database
External Validation: Cross-checks with web search and specialized APIs

projects.name: Interactive AI Tourist Robot (RoboMuse - Graduation Project)
projects.description: An autonomous museum guide designed to provide high-accuracy, context-aware information to visitors using AI.
projects.role: Led the AI module development, focusing on RAG integration for real-time interaction.

projects.name: RAG-based Question Answering System
projects.description: A high-performance QA system that processes documents to provide contextually accurate answers.
projects.core_function: Optimizing vector data retrieval and context window management.

capabilities_for_clients.can_build_rag: Yes, Ahmed is a specialist. He has built single-agent and multi-agent RAG systems.
capabilities_for_clients.can_build_chatbots: Yes, focusing on LLM-powered bots with external tool integration (Tavily, PlantNet).
capabilities_for_clients.generative_ai_expertise: Expertise gained through DEPI professional track, focusing on modern architectures like Transformers.
